<h2 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="builder-attribution"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#builder-attribution" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="size-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-xs text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 18 18" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true" class="size-3 shrink-0"><path d="M8.50001 6.827C8.14801 6.995 7.81801 7.225 7.52701 7.517L7.51701 7.527C6.13601 8.908 6.13601 11.146 7.51701 12.527L9.69201 14.702C11.073 16.083 13.311 16.083 14.692 14.702L14.702 14.692C16.083 13.311 16.083 11.073 14.702 9.692L13.771 8.761" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path><path d="M9.50002 11.173C9.85202 11.005 10.182 10.775 10.473 10.483L10.483 10.473C11.864 9.092 11.864 6.854 10.483 5.473L8.30802 3.298C6.92702 1.917 4.68902 1.917 3.30802 3.298L3.29802 3.308C1.91702 4.689 1.91702 6.927 3.29802 8.308L4.22902 9.239" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Builder Attribution</span></h2>
<span data-as="p">As part of the <a class="link" href="/programs/builders/overview">Builder Program</a>, attach your
builder code to orders so matched trades are credited to your builder profile.
The code is a 32-byte hex string that identifies your profile.</span>
<h3 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="attach-your-builder-code"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#attach-your-builder-code" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="size-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-xs text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 18 18" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true" class="size-3 shrink-0"><path d="M8.50001 6.827C8.14801 6.995 7.81801 7.225 7.52701 7.517L7.51701 7.527C6.13601 8.908 6.13601 11.146 7.51701 12.527L9.69201 14.702C11.073 16.083 13.311 16.083 14.692 14.702L14.702 14.692C16.083 13.311 16.083 11.073 14.702 9.692L13.771 8.761" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path><path d="M9.50002 11.173C9.85202 11.005 10.182 10.775 10.473 10.483L10.483 10.473C11.864 9.092 11.864 6.854 10.483 5.473L8.30802 3.298C6.92702 1.917 4.68902 1.917 3.30802 3.298L3.29802 3.308C1.91702 4.689 1.91702 6.927 3.29802 8.308L4.22902 9.239" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Attach Your Builder Code</span></h3>
<span data-as="p">In the builder account, open polymarket.com → Settings → Builders and copy the
<strong>Builder Code</strong> from your profile:</span>

<span data-as="p">Include the builder code in every order you want attributed to your integration.
Because it is part of the signed order, add it before signing.</span>

<span data-as="p">After an attributed order matches, query builder trades using your builder code
to confirm that the trade was credited to your profile. Orders that have not
matched do not appear in builder trade results.</span>

Works even in cancel-only mode.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml delete /cancel-all\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/trade/cancel-all-orders\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Cancel orders for a market\",\"description\":\"Cancels all open orders for the authenticated user in a specific market (condition) and asset.\\nWorks even in cancel-only mode.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml delete /cancel-market-orders\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/trade/cancel-orders-for-a-market\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get order scoring status\",\"description\":\"Checks if a specific order is currently scoring for rewards.\\n\\nAn order is considered \\\"scoring\\\" if it meets all the criteria for earning maker rewards:\\n- The order is live on a rewards-eligible market\\n- The order meets the minimum size requirements\\n- The order is within the valid spread range\\n- The order has been live for the required duration\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml get /order-scoring\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/trade/get-order-scoring-status\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Send heartbeat\",\"description\":\"Sends a heartbeat signal to maintain active session status.\\nIf heartbeats are not sent regularly, all open orders for the user will be automatically canceled.\\nThis is useful for automated trading systems that need to ensure orders are canceled\\nif the system becomes unresponsive.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml post /heartbeats\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/trade/send-heartbeat\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true}]},{\"group\":\"Trades\",\"pages\":[{\"title\":\"Get trades\",\"description\":\"Retrieves trades for the authenticated user. Returns paginated results.\\nRequires readonly or level 2 API key authentication.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml get /data/trades\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/trade/get-trades\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get builder trades\",\"description\":\"Retrieves trades attributed to a builder code.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml get /builder/trades\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/trade/get-builder-trades\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true}]},{\"group\":\"Rebates\",\"pages\":[{\"title\":\"Get current rebated fees for a maker\",\"description\":\"Returns the current rebated fees for a maker address on a given date.\\n\\nEach entry includes the condition ID, asset address, and the USDC amount rebated.\\n\\nThis endpoint does not require authentication.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml get /rebates/current\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/rebates/get-current-rebated-fees-for-a-maker\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true}]},{\"group\":\"Rewards\",\"pages\":[{\"title\":\"Get current active rewards configurations\",\"description\":\"Returns all current active rewards configurations grouped by market.\\n\\nWhen `sponsored=true`, returns sponsored reward configurations instead.\\n\\nResults are paginated (500 items per page). Use next_cursor to fetch subsequent pages.\\nA next_cursor value of \\\"LTE=\\\" indicates the last page.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml get /rewards/markets/current\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/rewards/get-current-active-rewards-configurations\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get raw rewards for a specific market\",\"description\":\"Returns an array of present and future rewards configured on a market.\\n\\nWhen `sponsored=true`, sponsored daily rates are folded into each config's\\n`rate_per_day` .\\n\\nResults are paginated (100 items per page). Use next_cursor to fetch subsequent pages.\\nA next_cursor value of \\\"LTE=\\\" indicates the last page.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml get /rewards/markets/{condition_id}\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/rewards/get-raw-rewards-for-a-specific-market\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get multiple markets with rewards\",\"description\":\"Returns a list of active markets with their reward configurations.\\nSupports text search, tag filtering, numeric filters, and sorting.\\n\\nResults are paginated (100 items per page by default). Use next_cursor to fetch subsequent pages.\\nA next_cursor value of \\\"LTE=\\\" indicates the last page.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml get /rewards/markets/multi\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/rewards/get-multiple-markets-with-rewards\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get earnings for user by date\",\"description\":\"Returns an array of user earnings per market for a provided day.\\n\\nRequires CLOB L2 Auth headers.\\n\\nResults are paginated (100 items per page). Use next_cursor to fetch subsequent pages.\\nA next_cursor value of \\\"LTE=\\\" indicates the last page.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml get /rewards/user\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/rewards/get-earnings-for-user-by-date\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get total earnings for user by date\",\"description\":\"Returns the summed total rewards earnings for a user on a provided day,\\ngrouped by asset address.\\n\\nRequires CLOB L2 Auth headers.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml get /rewards/user/total\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/rewards/get-total-earnings-for-user-by-date\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get reward percentages for user\",\"description\":\"Returns the real-time percentages of rewards that a user is earning per market.\\n\\nThe response is a map of condition_id to the percentage of total rewards\\nthe user is currently earning in that market.\\n\\nRequires CLOB L2 Auth headers.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml get /rewards/user/percentages\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/rewards/get-reward-percentages-for-user\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get user earnings and markets configuration\",\"description\":\"Returns an array of current rewards including user earnings and live percentages\\nper market for a provided day.\\n\\nResults are paginated (100 items per page by default, max 500). Use next_cursor to fetch subsequent pages.\\nA next_cursor value of \\\"LTE=\\\" indicates the last page.\\n\\nRequires CLOB L2 Auth headers.\\n\\nOptional features:\\n- Search by question/description using the `q` parameter\\n- Filter by tag slugs using `tag_slug` parameter (multiple values are OR'ed)\\n- Filter by favorite markets using `favorite_markets=true`\\n- Sort by various fields using `order_by` and `position` parameters\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml get request to the Relayer. Authenticated using Builder API Keys or Relayer API Keys.\\n\\nReturns immediately with the `transactionID` and a `state` of `STATE_NEW`. The onchain transaction hash is **not** included in this response — poll `GET /transaction` with the returned `transactionID` to retrieve the `transactionHash` once the transaction has been broadcast.\\n\\n**Builder API Key auth headers:**\\n- `POLY_BUILDER_API_KEY`\\n- `POLY_BUILDER_TIMESTAMP`\\n- `POLY_BUILDER_PASSPHRASE`\\n- `POLY_BUILDER_SIGNATURE`\\n\\n**Relayer API Key auth headers:**\\n- `RELAYER_API_KEY`\\n- `RELAYER_API_KEY_ADDRESS`\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/relayer-openapi.yaml post /submit\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/relayer/submit-a-transaction\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get a transaction by ID\",\"description\":\"Gets a transaction submitted to the Relayer. Takes in a required transaction ID as a query parameter.\\n\\nPoll this endpoint with the `transactionID` returned from `POST /submit` to retrieve the onchain `transactionHash` once the transaction has been broadcast.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/relayer-openapi.yaml get /transaction\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/relayer/get-a-transaction-by-id\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get recent transactions for a user\",\"description\":\"Gets the most recent transactions submitted to the Relayer, owned by a specific user. Authenticated using Builder API Keys or Relayer API Keys.\\n\\n**Builder API Key auth headers:**\\n- `POLY_BUILDER_API_KEY`\\n- `POLY_BUILDER_TIMESTAMP`\\n- `POLY_BUILDER_PASSPHRASE`\\n- `POLY_BUILDER_SIGNATURE`\\n\\n**Relayer API Key auth headers:**\\n- `RELAYER_API_KEY`\\n- `RELAYER_API_KEY_ADDRESS`\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/relayer-openapi.yaml get /transactions\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/relayer/get-recent-transactions-for-a-user\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get current nonce for a user\",\"description\":\"Gets the current Proxy or Safe nonce for a user. Takes in the user's signer address and the type of nonce to retrieve.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/relayer-openapi.yaml get /nonce\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/relayer/get-current-nonce-for-a-user\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get relayer address and nonce\",\"description\":\"Fetches the relayer address and nonce for a specific user. Takes in the user's signer address and the type of nonce to retrieve.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/relayer-openapi.yaml get /relay-payload\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/relayer/get-relayer-address-and-nonce\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Check if a wallet is deployed\",\"description\":\"Returns whether the wallet at the given address is deployed onchain.\\n\\nUse the `type` query parameter to choose which wallet type to check:\\n\\n- Pass user's Polymarket `SAFE` address (default): Gnosis Safe (SignatureType `2`).\\n- Pass user's Polymarket `WALLET` Deposit Wallet address: Deposit Wallet (signatureType `3`). See the [Deposit Wallet Guide](/trading/deposit-wallets) for setup.\\n\\nOmitting `type` is equivalent to `type=SAFE`.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/relayer-openapi.yaml get /deployed\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/relayer/check-if-a-wallet-is-deployed\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get all relayer API keys\",\"description\":\"Returns all relayer API keys for the authenticated address. Auth allowed: Gamma auth or Relayer API key auth (`RELAYER_API_KEY` + `RELAYER_API_KEY_ADDRESS`).\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/relayer-openapi.yaml get /relayer/api/keys\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/relayer-api-keys/get-all-relayer-api-keys\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true}]},{\"group\":\"Combos\",\"tag\":\"New\",\"pages\":[{\"title\":\"Get combo markets\",\"description\":\"Returns active markets that can be used as combo legs, ordered by volume\\ndescending. This endpoint is public and does not require CLOB\\nauthentication.\\n\\nEntries in `position_ids`, `outcomes`, and `outcome_prices` correspond by\\narray index (`[0]` is YES, `[1]` is NO). Posting a new auto-cancel replaces the\\nprevious one.\\n\\nThe switch is one-shot: once the deadline elapses and your open orders are\\ncancelled, the schedule clears automatically. Orders you place after the\\nfire are not affected by the expired deadline — re-arm to extend\\nprotection.\\n\\nEach account may trigger auto-cancel at most 10 times per UTC day. Once\\nthat limit is reached, further attempts to arm a schedule are rejected with\\n`auto_cancel_daily_limit_reached` until the next UTC day; clearing an\\nexisting schedule (`time: 0`) is always allowed.\\n\\nUse `GET /v1/account/auto-cancel` to check the current deadline, today's\\ntrigger count, and when the daily counter resets.\\n\\nRequires proxy signature, see [proxy signing](/http/signing#2-proxy-signing).\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/perps-openapi.json patch /v1/trade/auto-cancel\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/set-auto-cancel\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Update Leverage\",\"description\":\"Update leverage for an instrument.\\nRequires proxy signature, see [proxy signing](/http/signing#2-proxy-signing).\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/perps-openapi.json patch /v1/trade/leverage\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/update-leverage\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Create Proxy\",\"description\":\"Create a new proxy to sign orders. Returns an API secret for private account access.\\nRequires EOA signature, see [EOA signing](/http/signing#1-eoa-signing).\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/perps-openapi.json post /v1/account/proxy\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/create-proxy\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Delete Proxy\",\"description\":\"Delete a proxy by address.\\nRequires EOA signature, see [EOA signing](/http/signing#1-eoa-signing).\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/perps-openapi.json delete /v1/account/proxy\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/delete-proxy\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get Credentials\",\"description\":\"Get the account ID, address, and proxy keys for the authenticated account.\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/perps-openapi.json get /v1/account/credentials\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/get-credentials\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get Orders\",\"description\":\"Get historical order snapshots for the authenticated account from the order history database.\\nReturns the latest known state for each matching order, including accepted, open, partial,\\nfilled, and cancelled orders. /v1/account/funding\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/get-funding-charges\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Withdraw\",\"description\":\"Submit a signed withdrawal request.\\nRequires EOA signature, see [EOA signing](/http/signing#1-eoa-signing).\\n\\nThe `amount` field is the raw token amount including decimals (e.g. `\\\"100000000\\\"` for 100 USDC).\\nThis must match the `uint256 amount` value used in the EIP-712 `Withdraw` signature.\\n\\nThe `ts` field is Unix seconds (not milliseconds) because the on-chain contract validates it\\nagainst `block.timestamp`. It must also match the `uint64 ts` in the signed EIP-712 struct.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/perps-openapi.json post /v1/account/withdraw\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/withdraw\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Internal Transfer\",\"description\":\"Submit a signed internal ledger transfer between two exchange accounts.\\nRequires proxy signature using the standard signed-op flow.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/perps-openapi.json post /v1/account/internal-transfer\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/internal-transfer\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get Deposits\",\"description\":\"Get deposit history for the authenticated account.\\nIf no end time is provided, the current time will be used.\\nMaximum of 100 entries returned per request.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/perps-openapi.json get /v1/account/deposits\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/get-deposits\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get Internal Transfers\",\"description\":\"Get settled internal transfer history for the authenticated account.\\nReturns both inbound and outbound transfers.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/perps-openapi.json get /v1/account/internal-transfers\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/get-internal-transfers\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get Withdrawals\",\"description\":\"Get withdrawal history for the authenticated account.\\nIf no end time is provided, the current time will be used.\\nMaximum of 100 entries returned per request.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/perps-openapi.json get /v1/account/withdrawals\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/get-withdrawals\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get Account Stats\",\"description\":\"Get the authenticated account's 7-day trading stats (taker volume, maker volume,\\naccount maker share, and entity maker share when applicable).\\nStats are cached by UTC day and may be stale by up to 24 hours.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/perps-openapi.json get /v1/account/stats\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/get-account-stats\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get Account Limits\",\"description\":\"Get the authenticated account's effective rate-limit allowances for its current\\nvolume-based tier: order-action rate, open-order cap, and the display-only\\nmessages-per-minute figure. `open_orders` reflects the account's current live\\nopen-order count; the rate-usage counters (`actions_per_minute`,\\n`actions_burst`, and `reset`) are not tracked here and are reported as 0.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/perps-openapi.json get /v1/account/limits\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/get-account-limits\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get Account Rewards\",\"description\":\"Get per-instrument daily liquidity reward shares for the authenticated account.\\nReward periods run from 12:00 UTC to 12:00 UTC and are labeled by their UTC end date.\\nOI rewards pay 6% APR on the account's full daily average gross OI across all\\ninstruments when the combined daily average gross OI of its rewards entity is\\nat least $1M. Accounts without an entity mapping qualify independently.\\nThe first reward period starts at 2026-05-08 12:00 UTC. If no date range is provided,\\nthe latest computed reward period is returned.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/perps-openapi.json get /v1/account/rewards\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/get-account-rewards\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get Instrument Config\",\"description\":\"Get per-instrument configuration (leverage and margin mode) for the authenticated account.\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/perps-openapi.json get /v1/account/config\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/get-instrument-config\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get Auto-Cancel Status\",\"description\":\"Get the current auto-cancel dead-man-switch status for the authenticated\\naccount, including the armed deadline, today's trigger count, and when\\nthe daily counter resets.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/perps-openapi.json get /v1/account/auto-cancel\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/get-auto-cancel-status\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Create Account Invite\",\"description\":\"Create or return the authenticated account's primary invite code. The call\\nis idempotent for accounts that already have a primary invite code.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/perps-openapi.json post /v1/account/invite\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/create-account-invite\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get Account Referral\",\"description\":\"Get the authenticated account's invite code, parent referral code, direct\\nreferral count, and fee share rate.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/perps-openapi.json get /v1/account/referral\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/get-account-referral\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Apply Referral Code\",\"description\":\"Apply a referral code to the authenticated account after signup. const track = () =\u003e {\n    if (!activeAnchor) {\n      frameId = null;\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const { element, top, until } = activeAnchor;\n\n    if (!document.contains(element)) {\n      activeAnchor = null;\n      frameId = null;\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const nextTop = element.getBoundingClientRect().top;\n    const delta = nextTop - top;\n\n    if (delta !== 0) {\n      window.scrollTo({\n        top: window.scrollY + delta,\n        left: window.scrollX,\n        behavior: \"auto\",\n      });\n    }\n\n    if (performance.now() \u003c until) {\n      frameId = requestAnimationFrame(track);\n    } else {\n      activeAnchor = null;\n      frameId = null;\n    }\n  };\n\n  const startTracking = (tab) =\u003e {\n    activeAnchor = {\n      element: tab,\n document.addEventListener(\n    \"click\",\n    (event) =\u003e {\n      const tab = event.target.closest(TAB_SELECTOR);\n\n      if (!tab || !tab.closest(TABS_CONTAINER_SELECTOR)) {\n        return;\n      }\n\n      startTracking(tab);\n    },\n    true,\n  );\n\n  document.addEventListener(\n    \"keydown\",\n    (event) =\u003e {\n      if (event.key !== \"Enter\" \u0026\u0026
